settings.gg-dZbzIeuj_text:
The tank is crafted from 57% Polyamide and 43% Elastane, a high-performance blend selected for its softness, breathability, and stretch.

 

The fabric moves naturally with your body while maintaining its shape and support throughout the day. Smooth and lightweight against the skin, it feels comfortable to wear for hours without restriction.

 

Care Instructions
To preserve the fabric’s quality and elasticity:

  • Wash at temperatures below 40°C
  • Do not bleach
  • Do not iron
  • Do not dry clean

 

Designed for everyday wear, with long-lasting comfort and durability.

settings.ggo6IN6uaum_text:
🚚 Fast & Secure Shipping — Worldwide 🌍

 

🇺🇸 US Orders
If your item is in stock at our US warehouse, expect delivery in 3–5 business days.
Otherwise, allow 7–12 business days, depending on availability.

 

🇬🇧 UK Orders
Most UK deliveries arrive within 7–12 business days, depending on availability.

 

🌐 International Orders
Most international deliveries arrive within 7–14 business days, depending on your location.

 

📦 Order Tracking
As soon as your order ships, you’ll receive a tracking number by email to monitor your delivery in real time.

 

🛡️ Shipping Guarantee
If your item arrives damaged, don’t worry — you’re protected by our Shipping Guarantee.
Just contact us, and we’ll send you a free replacement. No hassle. No extra cost.

settings.gg-2a3b1fqh_text:
🌿 Gentle Lift & Better Upper-Body Posture

By supporting the chest properly, this tank naturally helps you stand more upright, reducing shoulder strain and improving posture throughout the day.

Better alignment means:

less tension on the shoulders and neck

a more lifted, balanced silhouette

a cleaner line under clothing

No shaping panels.
No compression.
Just intelligent support where you actually need it.
settings.gg5mzVQA---_text:
✅ Built-In Breast Support — Without a Bra

This tank top is designed to support your breasts naturally — no underwire, no digging straps, no bulky bra layers.

A structured inner support gently holds the bust in place, helping prevent sagging while maintaining a soft, natural shape.

No squeezing.
No flattening.
No “shelf bra” feeling.

Just real support you can wear all day — comfortably.
settings.ggkmxagkbJY_text:
💖 Smooth Silhouette. No Uniboob. Real Confidence.

Unlike most built-in bra tanks that flatten the chest or create a “uniboob” effect, this design supports and separates the bust subtly, keeping a feminine, natural look.

No sagging

No shifting pads

No awkward lines under clothes

A supported chest changes everything:
how your tops fit, how you stand, and how you feel.

You move freely.
You feel supported.
You feel confident — all day long.
